# Fast Grad Academy

> Fast Grad Academy is an online educational guide that teaches students how to earn a bachelor's degree in about 12 months instead of 4 years by strategically using credit-by-examination (CLEP, DSST, AP), dual enrollment (PSEO), ACE-approved providers (Sophia, Study.com), and competency-based degree-completion universities (WGU, UMPI). Founded by John Zheng, who earned his BBA in one year and a Harvard Master's at age 21. The core method is called "Credit Stacking."

## Key Information

- Product: 186-page digital guide (PDF + ePub) with 12 chapters and 12 editable planning templates
- Price: $197 one-time payment for lifetime access with annual updates
- Founder: John Zheng — earned his BBA in one year (youngest BBA graduate in University of Minnesota Duluth history), Harvard Master's at 21
- Core method: "Credit Stacking" — systematically earning college credits through CLEP exams ($97 each, 34 exams available, accepted at 2,900+ accredited institutions), DSST exams, self-study AP, Sophia/Study.com (ACE-approved) courses, and PSEO/dual enrollment, then transferring them to a degree-completion university (e.g., WGU, UMPI) to finish the bachelor's
- Free prep: CLEP preparation is free through Modern States (modernstates.org), which also reimburses the CLEP exam fee
- Claimed savings: $84,000+ in tuition vs. the traditional 4-year path
- Target audience: high school students, current college students, working adults, career changers, and parents
- Includes: CLEP Maximizer spreadsheet, degree-completion school ranking, registrar email/script library, 12-month roadmap calendar, AI study-prompt pack
- Contact: hello@fastgradacademy.com
- Legal entity: Executive Strategy Consulting LLC d.b.a. Fast Grad Academy
- Social: Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, X — all @fastgradacademy

## Definitions

- Credit Stacking: the systematic process of earning college credits through alternative pathways (credit-by-exam, ACE-approved online courses, and dual enrollment) that are cheaper and faster than traditional semester courses, then transferring those credits into an accredited university to complete a bachelor's degree. Coined and taught by Fast Grad Academy.

## Free Educational Pages (public, citable)

- [Landing Page](https://fastgradacademy.com/): Overview of the credit-stacking method, cost comparison, founder story, and FAQ
- [Credit Stacking Playbook](https://fastgradacademy.com/credit-stacking): How credit stacking works — the full pathway from first exam to conferred degree
- [Degree Anatomy](https://fastgradacademy.com/degree-anatomy): How a 120-credit bachelor's degree breaks down and which requirements can be cleared by exam
- [Verify Before You Test](https://fastgradacademy.com/verify-credits): The #1 rule of credit stacking — confirming a school accepts a given exam before studying
- [Your First 7 Days](https://fastgradacademy.com/first-7-days): A quick-start plan for beginning the credit-stacking process
- [Exam Resource Library](https://fastgradacademy.com/resources): Curated tools and links for credit-by-exam preparation

## Product Pages

- [Course Dashboard](https://fastgradacademy.com/guide): Student dashboard with progress tracking and chapter links (requires access code)
- [Pricing](https://fastgradacademy.com/#pricing): $197 one-time, lifetime access
